title: silene inflata subsp. maritima
intro: Silene inflata subsp. maritima, also known as sea catchfly, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Silene inflata subsp. maritima include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
